# HandleHub — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A marketplace platform dedicated to buying and selling social media accounts across all major platforms including Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube, and more. The business facilitates transactions between sellers who want to monetize their established accounts and buyers looking to acquire ready-made social media presence with existing followers and engagement.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Skip the grind and buy verified social media accounts with real followers. Score YouTube Music free access, premium-ready profiles, and instant influence today.

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
Learn how our secure marketplace turns your unused profiles into cash or lets you acquire YouTube Music playlist-curated accounts with active engagement in minutes.

### About
https://example.com/about
We built HandleHub to make social media account trading safe and rewarding. Discover how we help you bypass YouTube Premium cost and grow faster with pre-built audiences.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to buy or sell? Reach out and let our team guide you to YouTube Music free-ready profiles, transparent pricing, and zero-hassle transfers. Let&#39;s talk growth.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About HandleHub
A marketplace platform dedicated to buying and selling social media accounts across all major platforms including Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube, and more. The business facilitates transactions between sellers who want to monetize their established accounts and buyers looking to acquire ready-made social media presence with existing followers and engagement.

## Target Audience
- Influencer Entrepreneurs
- Digital Marketing Firms
- Niche Community Builders
- E-commerce Startups
- Content Creators

## Industry
E-commerce

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
